pr.title: Notable Non-Record: Text Diffusion (MDLM) — 1.4584 BPB — Masked Diffusion Language Model

output.summary: Causal 11L Transformer trains with MDLM diffusion steps, SUBS masking, stratified t sampling, and ELBO-weighted loss alongside NTP for sliding eval.
techniques: Causal adaptation of MDLM diffusion with SUBS masking
Stratified t sampling with ELBO-weighted loss
Mixed diffusion and next-token prediction training schedule
